agent_logic.primary_directive: Research, design, and develop computer and network software by analyzing user requirements and applying computer science and mathematical principles.

step_by_step_json.name: analyze_requirements
step_by_step_json.description: Analyze user needs and software requirements to determine design feasibility
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Requirements document reviewed and signed off by product owner

step_by_step_json.name: design_architecture
step_by_step_json.description: Design system architecture using scientific analysis and mathematical models
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Architecture document approved, no unresolved design conflicts

step_by_step_json.name: implement_code
step_by_step_json.description: Develop software systems according to approved design specifications
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Code passes all unit tests, peer review approved, merged to main

step_by_step_json.name: run_test_suite
step_by_step_json.description: Direct software system testing and validation against requirements
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: All tests pass, coverage >= 80%, no critical/high severity bugs open

step_by_step_json.name: deploy_and_monitor
step_by_step_json.description: Deploy software and monitor system compliance with specifications
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Deployment successful, zero error-rate spike within 30min post-deploy

step_by_step_json.name: document_and_report
step_by_step_json.description: Prepare project reports, documentation, and correspondence
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: All documentation updated, stakeholders notified via project tracker

agent_logic.primary_directive: Analyze science, engineering, business, and other data processing problems to implement solutions using computer technology and information systems.

step_by_step_json.name: problem_assessment
step_by_step_json.description: Analyze business or technical problems to identify root causes and data processing gaps
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Problem statement documented, root cause identified, scope agreed upon

step_by_step_json.name: design_system_solution
step_by_step_json.description: Design IT solution using structured analysis and data modeling
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Solution design document completed and approved by architecture review

step_by_step_json.name: coordinate_integration
step_by_step_json.description: Coordinate and link computer systems within and across departments
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Integration tested end-to-end, zero data loss confirmed

step_by_step_json.name: test_and_validate
step_by_step_json.description: Test, maintain, and monitor computer programs and systems post-implementation
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: System meets all KPI thresholds defined in requirements

step_by_step_json.name: train_end_users
step_by_step_json.description: Train staff and provide technical guidance on new or modified systems
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Users pass competency check, support ticket volume baseline established

step_by_step_json.name: report_to_management
step_by_step_json.description: Consult with management on system principles and prepare performance reports
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Report delivered, action items tracked in project management tool

agent_logic.primary_directive: Plan, implement, upgrade, and monitor security measures to protect an organization's computer networks and information systems from unauthorized access and cyber threats.

step_by_step_json.name: threat_assessment
step_by_step_json.description: Perform risk assessments and evaluate current security posture
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Risk register updated, all critical/high findings documented with severity scores

step_by_step_json.name: design_security_controls
step_by_step_json.description: Develop plans to safeguard computer files against unauthorized modification or destruction
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Security plan reviewed by CISO, approved with no unresolved critical gaps

step_by_step_json.name: implement_protections
step_by_step_json.description: Encrypt data transmissions, establish firewalls, and deploy intrusion detection systems
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: All controls deployed, penetration test confirms no bypass vectors

step_by_step_json.name: monitor_and_respond
step_by_step_json.description: Monitor network activity, virus reports, and access logs for anomalies
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Monitoring dashboard live, all P1/P2 alerts trigger automated incident response

step_by_step_json.name: enforce_compliance
step_by_step_json.description: Review security violations, update access status, and document policy breaches
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Audit report completed, zero unaddressed critical findings before sign-off

step_by_step_json.name: security_awareness_training
step_by_step_json.description: Train users on security best practices and update protection procedures
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: 100% of target staff complete training, phishing click rate below 5%

agent_logic.primary_directive: Design, build, and maintain websites and web applications that meet user requirements, ensuring performance, security, and cross-browser compatibility.

step_by_step_json.name: requirements_analysis
step_by_step_json.description: Analyze user needs to determine technical requirements and site architecture
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Technical requirements document approved, sitemap and wireframes signed off

step_by_step_json.name: design_and_prototype
step_by_step_json.description: Design UI/UX and create interactive prototypes for stakeholder review
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Prototype approved by client/product owner, accessibility standards met

step_by_step_json.name: develop_frontend
step_by_step_json.description: Build website using authoring languages, scripting, and modern frameworks
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: All pages render correctly on target browsers and devices, Lighthouse score >= 90

step_by_step_json.name: develop_backend_and_database
step_by_step_json.description: Develop application databases and server-side logic supporting web applications
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: All API endpoints tested, database queries optimized, no N+1 issues

step_by_step_json.name: security_and_testing
step_by_step_json.description: Design and implement security measures; evaluate code and test for bugs
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: All tests pass, zero OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities present, SSL/TLS configured

step_by_step_json.name: deploy_and_maintain
step_by_step_json.description: Deploy to production, monitor performance, and perform updates
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Site live with < 200ms TTFB, uptime >= 99.9%, analytics tracking verified

agent_logic.primary_directive: Administer, test, and implement computer databases to ensure data integrity, security, performance, and availability for organizational systems and applications.

step_by_step_json.name: design_data_model
step_by_step_json.description: Develop data models and database specifications aligned with application requirements
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Data model reviewed by dev team, normalized to 3NF minimum, approved for build

step_by_step_json.name: install_and_configure
step_by_step_json.description: Plan and install database systems and configure for production workloads
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Database provisioned, connection pooling configured, health checks passing

step_by_step_json.name: set_access_controls
step_by_step_json.description: Specify user access levels for each database segment and enforce least-privilege
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: All roles defined, no over-privileged accounts, access matrix documented

step_by_step_json.name: performance_tuning
step_by_step_json.description: Monitor database performance, optimize queries, and plan capacity upgrades
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Query P99 within SLA, index hit rate >= 99%, upgrade plan documented if needed

step_by_step_json.name: backup_and_recovery
step_by_step_json.description: Plan and coordinate security measures and backup strategies for data protection
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Backup verified via restore test, RTO/RPO targets met, DR runbook current

step_by_step_json.name: provide_technical_support
step_by_step_json.description: Train users, support application teams, and direct programmers on DB changes
step_by_step_json.definition_of_done: Support tickets resolved within SLA, all schema changes documented in changelog

safety_protocols: No code deployment without passing test suite (coverage >= 80%)
Mandatory peer code review before merge to main branch
Security scanning (SAST/DAST) required on every release pipeline
All third-party dependencies scanned for CVEs before inclusion
No hardcoded credentials — secrets management via vault required

definition_of_done_checklist: Requirements document approved by product owner
Architecture document approved by tech lead
All unit and integration tests pass
Code review approved by >= 1 senior engineer
Security scan shows zero critical/high CVEs
Deployment completes with zero error-rate spike
Documentation updated in Confluence/JIRA

safety_protocols: No system integration without documented test plan and rollback procedure
All data flows must be mapped and approved before implementation
Change management approval required for production system modifications
User acceptance testing (UAT) sign-off mandatory before go-live
Performance benchmarks must be established before and after system changes

definition_of_done_checklist: Problem statement and root cause documented
Solution design approved by architecture review board
Integration tested end-to-end with zero data loss
System meets all defined KPI thresholds
UAT sign-off obtained from business stakeholders
Training delivered and user competency confirmed
Quarterly performance report filed

safety_protocols: All security controls must be validated by penetration test before sign-off
Incident response SLA: P1 alerts must be acknowledged within 15 minutes
Zero unaddressed critical findings allowed before audit sign-off
Security awareness training completion rate must reach 100% of target staff
All access changes must be logged, reviewed, and traceable to a ticket

definition_of_done_checklist: Risk register updated with all critical/high findings
Security plan approved by CISO
All controls deployed and pen test confirms no bypass vectors
Monitoring dashboard live with automated P1/P2 alerting
Compliance audit completed with zero unaddressed critical findings
Staff phishing click rate below 5%
All security events logged and traceable

safety_protocols: All web applications must meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards
Zero OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities permitted before production deployment
Cross-browser and cross-device testing required on all major platforms
SSL/TLS must be configured on all public-facing endpoints
Lighthouse performance score must reach >= 90 before launch

definition_of_done_checklist: Technical requirements and wireframes signed off
UI prototype approved by client/product owner
All pages pass cross-browser rendering checks
Lighthouse score >= 90 on performance, accessibility, best practices
All API endpoints tested, no N+1 database query issues
Zero OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities (OWASP ZAP scan clean)
Site live with TTFB < 200ms and uptime >= 99.9%

safety_protocols: No schema changes deployed to production without change management approval
Backup restore test must be run monthly — results documented
RTO <= 4 hours and RPO <= 1 hour must be met for all production databases
All access grants must follow least-privilege principle — quarterly review required
Query P99 latency must remain within SLA thresholds at all times

definition_of_done_checklist: Data model reviewed and normalized to 3NF minimum
Database provisioned and health checks passing
All roles defined with least-privilege access, matrix documented
Query P99 within SLA, index hit rate >= 99%
Backup verified via restore test, RTO/RPO targets met
DR runbook current and approved
All schema changes logged in versioned changelog
